presets.label: Shivji on Nandi
presets.text: Shivji seated on Nandi (sacred bull); slow dignified motion; calm frontal three-quarter view.

presets.label: Krishna playing flute
presets.text: Krishna playing bansuri (flute); serene profile; soft pastoral light and gentle camera drift.

presets.label: Hanuman flying
presets.text: Hanuman in flight over peaks; gada visible; powerful forward motion; wind in clothes.

presets.label: Ganesha blessing
presets.text: Ganesha seated; blessing abhaya mudra; warm lamp-lit courtyard; relaxed divine presence.

presets.label: Durga on lion
presets.text: Durga on lion; fierce-calm stance; festival energy; strong silhouette against sky.

presets.label: Shiva & Parvati — Kailash
presets.text: Shiva and Parvati together on snowline; shared calm gaze toward horizon; wind in fabric; trident as vertical accent; vast peaks behind; slow joint walk or still tableau.

presets.label: Ram & Sita — forest exile
presets.text: Ram and Sita side by side on forest path; soft exile palette; dappled light; bow resting; quiet mutual reassurance; camera at respectful distance.

presets.label: Kartikeya — forward charge
presets.text: Kartikeya surging forward with vel lowered; dust burst from ground; low heroic angle; controlled speed readable in one short clip.

presets.label: Lakshmi — lotus rise
presets.text: Lakshmi rising from lotus on still water; coins or petals falling as soft glints; warm rim light; symmetrical calm framing; no chaotic motion.

presets.label: Two figures — mount clarity
presets.text: Focal deity seated on named mount; second named figure stands beside; each name used distinctly; no merged anatomy; slow dignified motion; readable spacing between bodies.
